transcript: I can't help falling in love with you I wonder if I'm ever on her mind, like she's on mine Probably not, swear I never seen a girl so fine She probably got tons of guys tryna hit her line And take her time, I could

timestamps.text: I can't help falling in love with you
I wonder if I'm ever on her mind, like she's on mine
Probably not, swear I never seen a girl so fine

And take her time, I could
